title: Character Actions
content:
Step (1) – Move up to 1” in any direction.
Jog (0) – Once per turn. Move up to 4”. If engaged, you cannot increase distance from enemy.
Traverse (2) – Move across an obstacle (1” thick or less) if in base contact.
Harvest (1) – Reduce Depth Value of a Moonstone in base contact by -1. Possession gained at '0'. Cannot be taken if engaged.
Melee Attack (1) – Make an attack against a model within Melee Range and LoS.
Active Ability (X) – Perform effect listed on card.
Arcane Ability (X) – Resolve Arcane Ability logic.
